_meta.instructions: Run step1-onboarding.js to refresh this profile. Add your API keys to blog-pipeline/.env (copy from .env.example).

business.name: Angler BI
business.tagline: Cast a wider net on your data insights
business.description: Expert business intelligence consulting — data strategy, Power BI dashboards, and predictive analytics.

icp.description: Mid-to-enterprise businesses that have data but lack the infrastructure or expertise to act on it confidently.
pain_points: Data silos across CRM, ERP, and other tools
No clear KPIs or visibility into business health
Gut-feel decisions due to lack of real-time data
Failed or stalled BI tool implementations

differentiators: Serves all org levels from executive to analyst

brand_voice.tone: Authoritative but approachable. Confident without being arrogant. Clear over clever.
brand_voice.personality: Strategic advisor, not vendor. Fishing/water metaphors welcomed but not forced.
brand_voice.writing_style: Short sentences. Active voice. Data-backed claims. Actionable takeaways. No fluff.

published.title: Power BI Copilot in 2026: Key Features and What They Mean for Your BI Strategy

_api_keys_note: API keys are loaded from blog-pipeline/.env — never stored here. See .env.example for setup.

required.purpose: Powers all Claude calls (Haiku for classification, Sonnet for writing)
Real-time web research — news, expert opinions, recent developments

recommended.purpose: Keyword research, SERP analysis, competitor rankings
Scrapes top-ranking competitor articles for structure analysis

optional.purpose: DALL-E image generation for article headers
Find relevant YouTube videos for transcript insights
optional.get_it: https://console.cloud.google.com → Enable YouTube Data API v3
